application_code: Check for hardcoded passwords, API keys, tokens
Check for SQL injection: string concatenation in queries
Check for XSS: unsanitized user input in HTML
Check for insecure JWT: hardcoded secrets, none algorithm
Check for debug mode enabled in production
Check for insecure random number generation for security
infrastructure: Check for S3 buckets with public access enabled
Check for security groups with 0.0.0.0/0 on sensitive ports
Check for RDS instances not in VPC
Check for CloudFormation stacks without deletion policy
Check for VPC without flow logs
iam_policies: Check for Resource: * combined with sensitive actions
Check for inline policies instead of managed policies
Check for missing MFA requirement on sensitive actions
Check for overly permissive s3:* or ec2:* permissions
Check for missing least privilege principle
